objective: Build a point-in-time macro growth-liquidity feature layer from macro_pit_panel, using only available_date as-of joins; no portfolio harness or model promotion.
forbidden: Do not run a portfolio backtest.
Do not generate NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return outputs.
Do not use any macro value without available_date.
Do not use future macro releases where available_date is after trade_date.
Do not claim official total-return evidence.
Do not promote macro features into the default model.
Do not tune V3.64/V3.65 same-branch MARKET proxy thresholds.
acceptance_criteria: V3.66 queue must contain the V3.69 macro_pit_panel feature-layer task.
V3.66 source inventory must mark macro_pit_panel ready for feature-layer use.
Macro panel must contain date, available_date, series_id, value, source, frequency, revision_policy, and pit_quality.
Every as-of join must satisfy available_date <= trade_date.
Feature panel must have at least 6000 dates and at least 3000 history-sufficient rows.
No output CSV column contains forbidden performance or promotion terms.
failure_conditions: Any output uses macro data without available_date.
Any output allows portfolio harness or model promotion.
Any NAV, Sharpe, drawdown, annualized return, or portfolio-return output is produced.
quality_gates: agent_run_manifest.json satisfies the manifest required field schema.
Forbidden performance or promotion column scan returns zero hits.
Secret leak scan returns zero paths.
next_handoff: factor_researcher should start V3.70 combined feature registry joining V3.67, V3.68, and V3.69 by signal_use_date.
